name: R2R | Relatório diário Meta ads por cliente

parameters.query:
WITH due AS (
  SELECT c.id
  FROM gestao_ads.reporting_clients c
  WHERE c.active = TRUE
    AND EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM (NOW() AT TIME ZONE c.timezone))::SMALLINT = ANY(c.send_days)
    AND NOW() >= ((((NOW() AT TIME ZONE c.timezone)::DATE + c.send_time) AT TIME ZONE c.timezone))
    AND NOW() <  ((((NOW() AT TIME ZONE c.timezone)::DATE + c.send_time) AT TIME ZONE c.timezone) + INTERVAL '15 minutes')
    AND c.last_sent_report_date IS DISTINCT FROM (NOW() AT TIME ZONE c.timezone)::DATE
    AND (c.locked_until IS NULL OR c.locked_until < NOW())
  ORDER BY c.send_time, c.created_at
  FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
  LIMIT 100
)
UPDATE gestao_ads.reporting_clients c
SET locked_until = NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes',
    lock_token = GEN_RANDOM_UUID(),
    updated_at = NOW()
FROM due
WHERE c.id = due.id
RETURNING c.*;

WITH updated AS (
  UPDATE gestao_ads.reporting_clients
  SET last_sent_report_date = $2::DATE,
      last_sent_at = NOW(),
      locked_until = NULL,
      lock_token = NULL,
      updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE id = $1::UUID
  RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO gestao_ads.reporting_runs (
  client_id,
  report_date,
  execution_id,
  status,
  channel,
  destination,
  metrics_today,
  metrics_yesterday,
  message,
  sent_at,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
SELECT
  id,
  $2::DATE,
  $3,
  $4,
  $5,
  $6,
  $7::JSONB,
  $8::JSONB,
  $9,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM updated
ON CONFLICT (client_id, report_date)
DO UPDATE SET
  execution_id = EXCLUDED.execution_id,
  status = EXCLUDED.status,
  channel = EXCLUDED.channel,
  destination = EXCLUDED.destination,
  metrics_today = EXCLUDED.metrics_today,
  metrics_yesterday = EXCLUDED.metrics_yesterday,
  message = EXCLUDED.message,
  sent_at = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Preparar Datas').item.json.id, $('Preparar Datas').item.json.report_date, $execution.id, $('Normalizar e Formatar').item.json.delivery_status, $('Normalizar e Formatar').item.json.channel, $('Normalizar e Formatar').item.json.destination, JSON.stringify($('Normalizar e Formatar').item.json.metrics_today), JSON.stringify($('Normalizar e Formatar').item.json.metrics_yesterday), $('Normalizar e Formatar').item.json.message ] }}

parameters.query:
WITH unlocked AS (
  UPDATE gestao_ads.reporting_clients
  SET locked_until = NULL,
      lock_token = NULL,
      updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE id = $1::UUID
  RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO gestao_ads.reporting_runs (
  client_id,
  report_date,
  execution_id,
  status,
  channel,
  destination,
  error_message,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
SELECT
  id,
  $2::DATE,
  $3,
  'failed',
  $4,
  $5,
  $6,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM unlocked
ON CONFLICT (client_id, report_date)
DO UPDATE SET
  execution_id = EXCLUDED.execution_id,
  status = 'failed',
  channel = EXCLUDED.channel,
  destination = EXCLUDED.destination,
  error_message = EXCLUDED.error_message,
  attempts = gestao_ads.reporting_runs.attempts + 1,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Preparar Datas').item.json.id, $('Preparar Datas').item.json.report_date, $execution.id, $('Normalizar e Formatar').item.json.channel, $('Normalizar e Formatar').item.json.destination, $('Normalizar e Formatar').item.json.api_error ] }}
